body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/custom-file/incr-add 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/custom-file/incr-add 
 ## 接口描述 
增量新增自定义档案选项接口，通过档案编码定位档案位置，通过optionId来判断选项的层级，以及新增的选项信息来实现增量新增自定义档案选项信息，单多层级选项总数均不可超过20000，多层级每层选项总数量不可超过1000。
接口所属功能路径：
智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 自定义档案 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"code20250422","required":true,"desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"options","label":"%E5%A2%9E%E9%87%8F%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E8%AF%A5%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA%E5%A2%9E%E9%87%8F%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E7%9A%84%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0%E5%9D%87%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8720000%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E6%AF%8F%E5%B1%82%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%871000%E3%80%82","required":true,"maxLength":"20000"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"optionId","label":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"4135","maxLength":"200","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E4%B8%BA%E5%93%AA%E4%B8%80%E5%B1%82%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%B9newOptionId%EF%BC%8CnewOptionName%EF%BC%8CserialNumber%EF%BC%8CapplyCompanies%EF%BC%8Cstatus%E7%AD%89%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E4%B8%BA%E6%9C%ACoptionId%E5%AD%90%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%9B%0A%202%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E6%97%B6%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0optionId%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E6%97%B6optionId%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%E5%B0%B1%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E4%B8%BA1%E3%80%82","required":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"newOptionId","maxLength":"200","label":"%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"4136","required":true,"desc":"%20%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"newOptionName","maxLength":"200","label":"%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B04136","required":true,"desc":"%20%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"serialNumber","maxLength":"5","label":"%E9%A1%BA%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA0%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA20000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"applyCompanies","maxLength":"1000","label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"73299","desc":"%20%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%B9%8B%E9%97%B4%E7%94%A8%2C%E5%88%86%E9%9A%94"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","maxLength":"1","label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%EF%BC%9A%E5%B7%B2%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%9B0%EF%BC%8C%E5%B7%B2%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E3%80%82"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","maxLength":"5","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%A2%9E%E9%87%8F%E6%8F%92%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","maxLength":"200"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{  
    "customFileId": "code20250422",  
    "options": [  
        {  
            "optionId": "4135",  
            "newOptionId": "4136", 
            "newOptionName": "4136", 
            "serialNumber": 0,  
            "applyCompanies": "73299",
            "status": "1" 
        },
        {  
            "optionId": "4135",  
            "newOptionId": "4137", 
            "newOptionName": "4137", 
            "serialNumber": 1,  
            "applyCompanies": "73299",
            "status": "1"  
        }  
    ]  
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{  
    "success": true,  
    "message": "选项增量插入成功！"  
}
```  
## 错误码说明

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/custom-file/incr-add

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/custom-file/incr-add

接口描述

增量新增自定义档案选项接口，通过档案编码定位档案位置，通过optionId来判断选项的层级，以及新增的选项信息来实现增量新增自定义档案选项信息，单多层级选项总数均不可超过20000，多层级每层选项总数量不可超过1000。 接口所属功能路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 自定义档案

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"code20250422","required":true,"desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"options","label":"%E5%A2%9E%E9%87%8F%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E8%AF%A5%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA%E5%A2%9E%E9%87%8F%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E7%9A%84%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0%E5%9D%87%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8720000%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E6%AF%8F%E5%B1%82%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%871000%E3%80%82","required":true,"maxLength":"20000"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"optionId","label":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"4135","maxLength":"200","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E4%B8%BA%E5%93%AA%E4%B8%80%E5%B1%82%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%B9newOptionId%EF%BC%8CnewOptionName%EF%BC%8CserialNumber%EF%BC%8CapplyCompanies%EF%BC%8Cstatus%E7%AD%89%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E4%B8%BA%E6%9C%ACoptionId%E5%AD%90%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%9B%0A%202%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E6%97%B6%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0optionId%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E6%97%B6optionId%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%E5%B0%B1%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%E4%B8%BA1%E3%80%82","required":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"newOptionId","maxLength":"200","label":"%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"4136","required":true,"desc":"%20%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"newOptionName","maxLength":"200","label":"%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B04136","required":true,"desc":"%20%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"serialNumber","maxLength":"5","label":"%E9%A1%BA%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA0%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA20000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"applyCompanies","maxLength":"1000","label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"73299","desc":"%20%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%B9%8B%E9%97%B4%E7%94%A8%2C%E5%88%86%E9%9A%94"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","maxLength":"1","label":"%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%EF%BC%9A%E5%B7%B2%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%9B0%EF%BC%8C%E5%B7%B2%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8%E3%80%82"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","maxLength":"5","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B9%E5%A2%9E%E9%87%8F%E6%8F%92%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","maxLength":"200"}}]}]}
